buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors duration-200 font-bold tracking-tight px-6 py-3
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#1DA851] transition-colors duration-200 font-bold tracking-tight px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.accent: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D63026] transition-colors duration-200 font-bold tracking-tight px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 font-bold tracking-tight px-6 py-3

cards.vehicle: flex flex-col border border-zinc-200 bg-white group hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.12)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: border-b-2 border-zinc-200 bg-transparent px-0 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-black transition-colors rounded-none placeholder:text-zinc-400

animations.reveal: staggered entrance animations for grid items (framer-motion)

hero_background.description: Black luxury car speeding on bridge with cityscape backdrop during twilight.
hero_background.usage: Home page hero section background with bg-black/40 overlay

dealer_cover.description: Modern mercedes-benz building with glass facade
dealer_cover.usage: Dealer profile mini-site default cover image

showroom.description: Sleek luxury cars showcased in a stylish, modern automotive dealership.
showroom.usage: Featured dealers section or about us

truck_category.description: Front view of a white GMC truck parked on a scenic road with trees in the background.

engine_specs.description: Detailed view of car engine parts
engine_specs.usage: Vehicle detail page specs section background or feature image

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast or text-shadow. Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/home/listing layouts to achieve the Swiss Brutalist/High-Contrast feel. Avoid Shadcn Card components for vehicles to prevent rigid look.
For forms, auth, and dealer dashboard, use Shadcn components but heavily customize them to remove borders where possible, or use sharp edges (rounded-none).
WhatsApp CTAs are the core conversion metric. They must be massive, highly visible, sticky on mobile detail pages, and use the exact #25D366 brand color.
Implement fluid typography for headings. Cabinet Grotesk should be used for all H1-H4. Satoshi for body.
Never use generic placeholders. Use the provided media URLs.
Ensure the price format is strictly Brazilian Real (e.g. R$ 39.900,00) and 'Consultar Valor' for empty.
Dealer mini-sites must feel premium. Use generous padding, large typography for their name, and a crisp clean grid for their inventory.
